title: GitBook Change Request
description: A change request in GitBook represents a proposed set of content changes to a space, similar to a pull request. Change requests support collaborative review workflows before merging into the main content.

id.description: The unique identifier of the change request.

number.description: The sequential number of the change request.

subject.description: The title or subject of the change request.

description.description: A description of the change request.

status.description: The current status of the change request.

createdBy.description: The user who created the change request.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the change request was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the change request was last updated.

mergedAt.description: The timestamp when the change request was merged, if applicable.
